transcript.text:
[Today's episode: Tzuyang at Mom's Touch High School]
[Know Thy Intestines]
Am I early?
[She is the first one here]
[1st Period: New item from Mom's Touch]
I should've came a little later
I'm hungry
Should I just eat?
[She decides to eat anyways]
Is this their new item?
Pour all the fries out
Looks good
What's this? Sweet & sour chicken
[Cajun Sweet & Sour Boneless Chicken]
It's pretty small
Let's start with the biggest one

Its name is.. Psy Flex Burger?
[Warning: Your jaw will possibly break if you try to take a full bite]
How big can it be?
This is way too big
This has..
Tomatoes,
2 chicken patties,
I also see cheese
Start with some lettuce first,
I'm #1 here I have to do it
Press it together
Really delicious
This is like eating 2 burgers
This isn't easy
Mom's Touch's chicken patties are always tasty
[Crispy Cream Cheeseball]

Getting the cheeseball from here is definitely a must
Too good
I think this is perfect if 1 regular psy burger doesn't fill you up
This is hard to eat
Boneless chicken
Yum
It's been sitting here, but it's still crispy
The cheese makes this taste so much better
I like the tomato and the cheese
Last bite
In 1 bite
What should I eat first?
Garlic Soy Sauce Psy Burger
I can smell it
The garlic smell
It's soy chicken in a burger form

The soy base has a very strong garlic flavoring
It's very unique It's different from the psy burger
[Tzuh-yang] Tzuyang's twin sister (Ranked #3 in the school)
Are you already here?
I've been here When will you come in?
I'll be back later
Spicy Chicken Sandwich
Let's cut it up
That cuts well
I'm curious about this one
It's really a spicy seasoned chicken sandwich
Right?
It's very similar to the soy sauce one
It's not too sweet
A bit salty and
It also has a very distinct scent

This tastes really good
Oh hey
Why're you so early?
You're early, but I finished everything already
Isn't that their new item? Was it good?
It's good
You have to do a mukbang Yeah, I filmed it
Where are you going?
I'm going to go eat
I have some french fries here for you
Good, because I didn't get any fries
So dirty
I'm excited to try the new item
This is my favorite Fried Garlic Seaweed Roll & Dumplings
Only I know this
This is how you pour it

No foam
Good thing she left me some fries
I really like this item
It's..
[Let me eat first]
Garlic sauce
Which one should I eat first?
Soy sauce chicken
It looks great
These have the same smell
It looks good
I didn't eat anything the whole day
My first meal
Bon appetit
Yum
It feels like I had this before for some odd reason

The sauce is really..
A combination of sweet & salty
How do I know that this is sweeter than the spicy seasoned chicken sandwich?
Weird.. [Am I a genius?]
[Tzu-chul] Tzuyang's twin brother (Rank #2 in the school)
You left this Oh right
Thank you
When will you come? In a bit
How did we end up with this concept?
For the next one,
Spicy seasoned chicken
The sauce is really red
I dropped it
Should I cut this in half?
This cuts so well
What is this?

So good
Oh no
Not a good idea to eat this in front of your significant other
[That doesn't matter for her]
It's much easier to eat when it's cut
Finished
I should give it to Tzu-chul
Make it look like it's new
[Tzu-chul enters]
What? You're still here?
I brought this to eat
You ate 3 sandwiches and have leftovers?
It's for you
I'm gonna go now
So lazy to film
Is that it?

[No need for a cup]
Is this the new burger?
Why does it feel like I'm seeing it for the 3rd time?
The more I see it..
I mean.. It's big!
Let's cut it
Bon appetit
It's good
Why is it so big?
I came to school so late No one's here
No one's been here though
I don't even know what to say
My hair is itchy
I forgot about this
Cheese ball
It's not warm, but it's still good

[Why!]
[Why did I agree to do this concept?]
I can't take this anymore It's too embarrassing
I can't stay still
Garlic Soy
The patty is different from the psy burger
Maybe because of the sauce
The outside feels different
The patty is very chewy
Delicious
Do you know how many cans of coke I drank?
[1 bag]
[8 cans]
I've never had so many cans of coke before
Wait, nvm I have
Refreshing

The cheese ball tastes so good
One of the best cheese balls I've had
My actual last burger
The sauce is a very traditional sauce
But it's less sweet
I feel like I will crave this later
Let's cut this cheese ball
It's like cream cheese
[Report cards will be passed out today]
[It feels good to have eaten Mom's Touch all night]
